revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-3-305

The automatic increase, according to a specified law, of the variation of the mean level of a signal, for example in order to restore the original form of a signal after it has been subjected to a compression.

Reference: I.E.C.

{{IALAFooter}}
